calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-07-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 611; Judge: Diane Elan Wick; Clerk: Rani Edwards; Reporter: Candace Yount.
Pro Per Plaintiff: Devendra Patel; present; sworn and narrated testimony.
No appearance by the Defendant: Sailor Amstrong; Jasin Armstrong.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 917 Folsom Street, # 309, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $4336.99
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.

Judgment signed in open court.
